name: GOT Dragon Rider (4x Upscale)
description: Transform your image into Game of Thrones cinematic dragon rider + fast 4x upscale (2 credits)

default_prompts.image_edit:
Use Image A as a high-fidelity facial reference for likeness and fine features (not strict identity lock).
Generate a true photorealistic cinematic shot of a single warrior riding one massive dark dragon in flight.
Composition priority:
one dragon only (no extra dragons)
rider is physically seated on the dragon's neck saddle (clear contact)
legs positioned naturally along the dragon's body, hands gripping reins attached to the dragon
correct human riding posture with proper weight and balance
no floating or disconnected body parts
Camera framing:
close-up cinematic shot
dragon head partially in frame beside the rider (not duplicated)
dragon mouth open with subtle fire glow
both rider and dragon aligned in the same depth plane
Face realism priority:
natural human face (no stylization)
visible skin pores, micro-wrinkles, slight asymmetry
realistic eyes, teeth, and lips when smiling
accurate head-to-body proportions
Seamless integration:
correct neck anatomy and shoulder alignment
consistent skin tone from face to hands
physically accurate lighting and shadows
proper contact shadows between rider and dragon saddle
no cut-paste look, no halos, no mismatched edges
Dragon realism:
biological texture (not cartoon)
detailed scales with imperfections, scratches, dirt
natural wetness variation and subsurface scattering
no stylized or exaggerated fantasy shapes
Materials:
realistic metal armor with wear, scratches, dirt
leather straps with tension and pressure where gripped
Rendering constraints:
STRICT photorealism — no cartoon, no CGI, no illustration
no plastic skin, no oversmoothing
real-world lighting, cinematic lens (85mm), shallow depth of field
sharp focus on rider face and dragon eye
HDR, high dynamic range, natural color grading
no duplication, no distortion, no extra limbs, no artifacts
default_prompts.upscale: Ultra high-resolution photorealistic dragon rider, sharp focus, intricate details, cinematic quality, 8K, HDR
